Operation 'get_/api/storage/profile-system/schemas/profileSystem' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. The summary 'Get full schema' is too generic and doesn't clarify what schema or its purpose. The description lacks clarity about what is returned and when this operation would be used. Enhanced summary specifies 'profile schema' and includes 'custom fields'. Enhanced description explains the return value (complete schema definition) and provides context about when an AI agent should use this operation (to understand profile data structure).

data.current_description:
Retrieves the full profile schema, including custom fields.
 
Learn more about the [Profile System](https://developers.vtex.com/vtex-rest-api/docs/profile-system) and its other API endpoints.

>⚠️ The Profile System is only compatible with stores using the PII data architecture from [Data Protection Plus](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/data-protection-plus), which is in closed beta phase, only available in select regions.
>
 > This feature is part of [VTEX Shield](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/vtex-shield--2CVk6H9eY2CBtHjtDI7BFh). If you are already a VTEX customer and want to adopt VTEX Shield for your business, please contact [Commercial Support](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/support-at-vtex--4AXsGdGHqExp9ZkiNq9eMy/3KQWGgkPOwbFTPfBxL7YwZ). Additional fees may apply. If you are not yet a customer but are interested in this solution, please complete our [contact form](https://vtex.com/us-en/contact/).
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve complete profile schema with custom fields
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete profile schema for the account, including both standard and custom fields. Returns the full schema definition containing all field configurations and metadata. This operation is essential for understanding the structure of profile data stored in the Profile System.
data.reasoning: The summary 'Get full schema' is too generic and doesn't clarify what schema or its purpose. The description lacks clarity about what is returned and when this operation would be used. Enhanced summary specifies 'profile schema' and includes 'custom fields'. Enhanced description explains the return value (complete schema definition) and provides context about when an AI agent should use this operation (to understand profile data structure).

message: Operation 'CreateOrUpdateProfileSchema' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, not_actionable. The summary is ambiguous about the operation being an update/replace operation, not just create or delete. The description lacks clarity about the destructive nature (replaces entire schema) and what constitutes valid input. Enhanced summary clarifies it's a create/update/delete operation. Enhanced description specifies the input format (request body with definitions or empty JSON), explains the replacement behavior, clarifies the return value, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.current_description:
Creates or deletes custom fields in the profile schema. To create custom fields, include a request body. To delete all custom fields, pass an empty JSON. 

> Each account has one profile schema. Updating it with this request will substitute the previous version.

Learn more about the [Profile System](https://developers.vtex.com/vtex-rest-api/docs/profile-system) and its other API endpoints.

>⚠️ The Profile System is only compatible with stores using the PII data architecture from [Data Protection Plus](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/data-protection-plus), which is in closed beta phase, only available in select regions.
>
 > This feature is part of [VTEX Shield](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/vtex-shield--2CVk6H9eY2CBtHjtDI7BFh). If you are already a VTEX customer and want to adopt VTEX Shield for your business, please contact [Commercial Support](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/support-at-vtex--4AXsGdGHqExp9ZkiNq9eMy/3KQWGgkPOwbFTPfBxL7YwZ). Additional fees may apply. If you are not yet a customer but are interested in this solution, please complete our [contact form](https://vtex.com/us-en/contact/).
data.summary_suggestion: Create, update, or delete profile custom fields
data.description_suggestion: Creates, updates, or deletes custom fields in the profile schema. Send a request body with custom field definitions to create or update fields, or send an empty JSON object to delete all custom fields. This operation replaces the entire previous schema version for the account. Returns the updated schema configuration. Use this to extend the profile schema with business-specific fields beyond standard profile attributes.
data.reasoning: The summary is ambiguous about the operation being an update/replace operation, not just create or delete. The description lacks clarity about the destructive nature (replaces entire schema) and what constitutes valid input. Enhanced summary clarifies it's a create/update/delete operation. Enhanced description specifies the input format (request body with definitions or empty JSON), explains the replacement behavior, clarifies the return value, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

message: Operation 'GetAddressByVersion' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description lacks clarity about what 'masked' means in context and doesn't explain the return value or the purpose of version history. Added explicit mention of PII masking, clarified the return value, and explained the operational context of version tracking for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description:
Retrieves information of a specific version address of a given client.

> For security and privacy reasons, this request returns masked address data by version. For unmasked information, see [Get unmasked address by version](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/profile-system#get-/api/storage/profile-system/profiles/-profileId-/addresses/-addressId-/versions/-addressVersionId-/unmask).

data.current_description:
Creates new client profile.

You can send custom fields in the request body and they will be saved as part of your document. Therefore, the schema and examples presented below may differ from yours. Your integration must be adapted accordingly.

The `id` field returned by this request is the `profileId` used to retrieve information on a specific profile later.
 
Learn more about the [Profile System](https://developers.vtex.com/vtex-rest-api/docs/profile-system) and its other API endpoints.

>⚠️ The Profile System is only compatible with stores using the PII data architecture from [Data Protection Plus](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/data-protection-plus), which is in closed beta phase, only available in select regions.
>
 > This feature is part of [VTEX Shield](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/vtex-shield--2CVk6H9eY2CBtHjtDI7BFh). Added explicit details about response type and status code to help AI agents understand what to expect from the operation.

data.current_description:
Updates one or more fields of existing purchase information for a given client profile.

Learn more about the [Profile System](https://developers.vtex.com/vtex-rest-api/docs/profile-system) and its other API endpoints.

>⚠️ The Profile System is only compatible with stores using the PII data architecture from [Data Protection Plus](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/data-protection-plus), which is in closed beta phase, only available in select regions.
>
 > This feature is part of [VTEX Shield](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/vtex-shield--2CVk6H9eY2CBtHjtDI7BFh). If you are already a VTEX customer and want to adopt VTEX Shield for your business, please contact [Commercial Support](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/support-at-vtex--4AXsGdGHqExp9ZkiNq9eMy/3KQWGgkPOwbFTPfBxL7YwZ). Additional fees may apply. If you are not yet a customer but are interested in this solution, please complete our [contact form](https://vtex.com/us-en/contact/).
data.description_suggestion: Performs a partial update of purchase information for a client profile identified by `profileId`. Accepts a PurchaseInfo object with only the fields to be updated; omitted fields remain unchanged. Returns the updated purchase information record with a 200 status code. Supports selective field updates without affecting existing data.
data.reasoning: The current description mentions partial updates but doesn't clarify the response format or confirm the HTTP status code. Added explicit details about response type and status code to help AI agents understand what to expect from the operation.

data.current_description:
Deletes purchase informaiton by `profileId`.

Learn more about the [Profile System](https://developers.vtex.com/vtex-rest-api/docs/profile-system) and its other API endpoints.

>⚠️ The Profile System is only compatible with stores using the PII data architecture from [Data Protection Plus](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/data-protection-plus), which is in closed beta phase, only available in select regions.
>
 > This feature is part of [VTEX Shield](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/vtex-shield--2CVk6H9eY2CBtHjtDI7BFh). If you are already a VTEX customer and want to adopt VTEX Shield for your business, please contact [Commercial Support](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/support-at-vtex--4AXsGdGHqExp9ZkiNq9eMy/3KQWGgkPOwbFTPfBxL7YwZ). Additional fees may apply. If you are not yet a customer but are interested in this solution, please complete our [contact form](https://vtex.com/us-en/contact/).
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes all purchase information associated with a client profile identified by `profileId`. This operation removes the entire purchase information record and cannot be undone. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion. Requires appropriate License Manager permissions (Delete Item resource).
data.reasoning: The current description contains a typo ('informaiton') and lacks critical details about the operation's destructive nature, response code, and permission requirements. Added information about permanence, response code, and prerequisites to help AI agents understand the consequences and prerequisites of this operation.

message: Operation 'GetUnmaskedPurchaseInformation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. The current description doesn't explain the distinction between masked and unmasked data or why an AI agent would choose this endpoint over the standard Get Purchase Information. Added context about data sensitivity, response type, and use case guidance to improve AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description:
Retrieves unmasked purchase information of a given client, by its `profileId`.

Learn more about the [Profile System](https://developers.vtex.com/vtex-rest-api/docs/profile-system) and its other API endpoints.

>⚠️ The Profile System is only compatible with stores using the PII data architecture from [Data Protection Plus](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/data-protection-plus), which is in closed beta phase, only available in select regions.
>
 > This feature is part of [VTEX Shield](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/vtex-shield--2CVk6H9eY2CBtHjtDI7BFh). If you are already a VTEX customer and want to adopt VTEX Shield for your business, please contact [Commercial Support](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/support-at-vtex--4AXsGdGHqExp9ZkiNq9eMy/3KQWGgkPOwbFTPfBxL7YwZ). Additional fees may apply. If you are not yet a customer but are interested in this solution, please complete our [contact form](https://vtex.com/us-en/contact/).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete unmasked purchase information for a client profile identified by `profileId`. Unlike the standard Get Purchase Information endpoint, this returns sensitive PII data in plaintext without masking. Returns an UnmaskedPurchaseInfoResponse object containing the full purchase history and details. Requires appropriate License Manager permissions and should be used only when unmasked data access is necessary.
data.reasoning: The current description doesn't explain the distinction between masked and unmasked data or why an AI agent would choose this endpoint over the standard Get Purchase Information. Added context about data sensitivity, response type, and use case guidance to improve AI agent decision-making.
